title: verbascum chazaliei
intro: Verbascum chazaliei, also known as Chazalie's mullein or Verbascum chazaliei, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family. It is a biennial herb used in traditional medicine, particularly for its mucilaginous and demulcent properties. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for soothing skin irritations, coughs, and respiratory issues. The herb can be prepared through infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
